r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Golfers believe their slice is caused by swinging over-the-top, poor grip, failing to swing from the inside, not keeping their elbow in, not transferring weight, not finishing through the shot, or not flipping wrists at impact. They believe fixing any of these mechanical issues will fix the slice.
relatability_triggers: Here's a FACT: a slice — even one that's been haunting you for years or decades — can be fixed PERMANENTLY in just 5 minutes and 1 SHOT on the range...

Existing belief: Golfers believe their slice is caused by swinging over-the-top, poor grip, failing to swing from the inside, not keeping their elbow in, not transferring weight, not finishing through the shot, or not flipping wrists at impact. They believe fixing any of these mechanical issues will fix the slice.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Counter-Slice Sequence / 1-Shot Slice Fix: The Counter-Slice Sequence is a 5-minute, 3-step practice swing sequence that retrains your mind and body to FEEL the correct clubface-to-path position without ever hitting a ball. Step 1: 'Clockwise Practice Swing' — lets you FEEL exactly where the club needs to be in the backswing, automatically getting your swing on the perfect path without forcing it. For most players, this alone dramatically changes or ends their slice. Step 2: 'Reverse Right Move' — tricks your brain into squaring the club relative to the path at all times. Now that swing path is falling into the slot effortlessly, this locks the clubface into correct angle of attack so left-to-right ball flight turns into a perfect draw. Feels counterintuitive and weird at first. Step 3: 'Relax and Release Move' — guards against overcompensation and permanently keeps clubface square to the path. Automates gains and ensures slice never comes back. Takes only 30-60 seconds. Installs the 'feel' for a square-to-path clubface so deeply it's literally impossible to forget. The sequence works because it directly addresses the ONLY root cause of every slice: clubface open relative to path. Modern ball flight laws (confirmed by Trackman technology) prove that clubface angle at impact determines ball direction, and path determines spin — the exact opposite of what was taught for decades.
mechanism_proof_points: Hank Haney — Tiger Woods' swing coach for 6 years (31 PGA Tour wins, 6 majors)
Mark O'Meara's coach for 25 years (125th to 2nd on PGA money list in 2 years)
70,000+ career lessons to amateurs over 40+ years
50-golfer documented case study proving method works
Trackman swing analysis technology validates ball flight science
unique_differentiators: The only 1-shot slice fix EVER created in golf. The only method that addresses the true root cause (clubface open to path) rather than symptoms. Developed over 40 years of high-level coaching from amateurs to Tiger Woods. Proven in documented 50-golfer case study. Works without hitting a single ball. Results in ONE shot, permanently.

headline.vsl_adaptation: Here's a FACT: a slice — even one that's been haunting you for years or decades — can be fixed PERMANENTLY in just 5 minutes and 1 SHOT on the range... What I'm about to share with you will fundamentally shift your understanding of what's really going on...

lead.full_text: Here's a FACT: a slice — even one that's been haunting you for years or decades — can be fixed PERMANENTLY in just 5 minutes and 1 SHOT on the range... Hi, my name is Hank Haney... And right here, right now I'm going to teach you a simple method for immediately turning your nasty slice... into a draw that flies 20 to 30 yards farther... And helps slash the extra 8 to 10 strokes your slice is likely causing you now... So listen... I know that's a big promise... And if you're thinking "but I've tried everything" — I understand... But let me ask you a question... Of the slice-fixing techniques you've tried before — how many of them were created by Tiger Woods' former coach? Pretty sure the answer is ZERO... And how many were proven — not only in 70,000 lessons given to amateur golfers over 40 years... but also proven in a LIVE, documented case study — where 50 of the worst lifelong slices were fixed in less than 5 minutes? Again... pretty sure it's ZERO. That means what you're about to discover is unlike anything you've ever been taught before... Because with any piece of golf advice... You should always judge based on WHO it's coming from... Frankly, I'm NOT your average golf instructor... And this isn't some random golf tip you're getting from a local pro or a magazine... This is coming DIRECTLY from a swing coach who has spent 4 decades working — inside the ropes — with some of the greatest players to ever live... So in light of all that, I hope you can give me the benefit of the doubt for just a few short minutes... And allow me to demonstrate the power of what I call the 5-minute "counter-slice sequence" for you — right here in this brief video...
lead.hook_sentence: Here's a FACT: a slice — even one that's been haunting you for years or decades — can be fixed PERMANENTLY in just 5 minutes and 1 SHOT on the range...
lead.transition_to_body: Transitions from lead to body via benefit stacking and future pacing: 'Because I'm committed to making sure — that after today — you NEVER hit another slice again...' followed by pain point agitation and root cause tease.

promise_architecture.failure_reframe: It's not your fault. Every slice fix you've been taught — strengthening your grip, swinging from the inside, flipping your wrists at impact, fixing your over-the-top swing — these are all 'overcompensations' that mask the real root cause. They're like putting a band-aid on a gunshot wound. They only work temporarily because they never address the ONE real reason you slice: your clubface is open relative to the path. You had the wrong information.

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Golfers believe their slice is caused by swinging over-the-top, poor grip, failing to swing from the inside, not keeping their elbow in, not transferring weight, not finishing through the shot, or not flipping wrists at impact. They believe fixing any of these mechanical issues will fix the slice.
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: The ONE and ONLY reason you EVER hit the ball right is because your clubface is open relative to the path of your swing. Not open to target — open to PATH. Even an inside-out swing will slice if clubface is 1 degree open to path. Even an over-the-top swing can draw if clubface is 1 degree closed to path. Ball flight laws prove the clubface angle at impact determines direction, and path determines spin. This is the opposite of what conventional golf wisdom taught for decades.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Every fix you've tried — strengthening grip, swinging inside-out, flipping wrists, keeping elbow in — these are all 'overcompensations' that don't address clubface-to-path relationship. They're like hitting snooze on your alarm clock: temporarily turns off the noise, but it always comes back. Your body naturally overcompensates when fixes don't work, creating an even worse over-the-top move. This is why fixes work on the range but fail on the course, or work for a few days then disappear.

villain_profile.villain_name: Conventional golf instruction / outdated ball flight laws
villain_profile.villain_motivation: For decades, conventional golf knowledge believed that the swing path determined which way the ball travels after leaving the face of the club. Golf instructors, TV shows, magazines, and YouTube videos all perpetuated this incorrect understanding, leading golfers to focus on fixing path instead of clubface-to-path relationship.
villain_profile.villain_evidence: Trackman and modern swing analysis technology has proven the old ball flight laws wrong. Clubface angle at impact determines direction; path determines spin. This is the exact opposite of what was taught for decades. Visual demonstrations in the VSL show inside-out swings still slicing and over-the-top swings drawing.

key_metaphors: Band-aid on a gunshot wound — conventional fixes only mask symptoms
Hitting snooze on alarm clock — overcompensations temporarily silence the problem but it always returns
Pulling the plug on alarm clock — getting clubface square to path eliminates slice FOREVER
Insurance claim for someone's window — 3 degrees open to path
Old vs. new ball flight laws — paradigm shift in understanding what controls ball direction
countersells: Strengthening grip doesn't work because it doesn't change clubface relative to path, only to target
Swinging from the inside doesn't work because you can swing inside-out and still slice if clubface is open to path
Flipping wrists at impact doesn't work because it's an inconsistent overcompensation
Fixing over-the-top swing is NOT the first place to start because even OTT swings can draw if clubface is closed to path
Keeping elbow in doesn't address root cause
Weight transfer doesn't address root cause
YouTube videos, golf magazines, local pros don't teach this because they don't know about clubface-to-path relationship
Beating balls on range doesn't work — takes 30+ sessions with only temporary results because root cause isn't addressed

mechanism.name: Counter-Slice Sequence / 1-Shot Slice Fix
mechanism.explanation_text: The Counter-Slice Sequence is a 5-minute, 3-step practice swing sequence that retrains your mind and body to FEEL the correct clubface-to-path position without ever hitting a ball. Step 1: 'Clockwise Practice Swing' — lets you FEEL exactly where the club needs to be in the backswing, automatically getting your swing on the perfect path without forcing it. For most players, this alone dramatically changes or ends their slice. Step 2: 'Reverse Right Move' — tricks your brain into squaring the club relative to the path at all times. Now that swing path is falling into the slot effortlessly, this locks the clubface into correct angle of attack so left-to-right ball flight turns into a perfect draw. Feels counterintuitive and weird at first. Step 3: 'Relax and Release Move' — guards against overcompensation and permanently keeps clubface square to the path. Automates gains and ensures slice never comes back. Takes only 30-60 seconds. Installs the 'feel' for a square-to-path clubface so deeply it's literally impossible to forget. The sequence works because it directly addresses the ONLY root cause of every slice: clubface open relative to path. Modern ball flight laws (confirmed by Trackman technology) prove that clubface angle at impact determines ball direction, and path determines spin — the exact opposite of what was taught for decades.
credibility_anchors: Hank Haney — Tiger Woods' swing coach for 6 years (31 PGA Tour wins, 6 majors)
Mark O'Meara's coach for 25 years (125th to 2nd on PGA money list in 2 years)
70,000+ career lessons to amateurs over 40+ years
50-golfer documented case study proving method works
Trackman swing analysis technology validates ball flight science
Celebrity coaching: Charles Barkley, Rush Limbaugh, Joe Namath, Michael Phelps, Adam Levine, Ray Romano, Herm Edwards on The Haney Project
Sports Illustrated citation: 'He won 31 of 75 starts... victories piled up faster than at any point in his ultra-lengthy prime'
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: The only 1-shot slice fix EVER created in golf. The only method that addresses the true root cause (clubface open to path) rather than symptoms. Developed over 40 years of high-level coaching from amateurs to Tiger Woods. Proven in documented 50-golfer case study. Works without hitting a single ball. Results in ONE shot, permanently.

e5_mechanism_type.explanation: The Counter-Slice Sequence is a branded, proprietary 3-step behavioral method. The underlying science (clubface-to-path relationship governing ball flight) is established physics validated by Trackman. However, the specific 3-step practice swing sequence (Clockwise Practice Swing, Reverse Right Move, Relax and Release Move) is Haney's proprietary system for retraining the golfer's feel. It reframes the root cause (not about swing path, about clubface-to-path) which is an E3 reframe, then wraps it in a proprietary delivery system which pushes to E4. Not E5 because the underlying ball flight physics aren't new — they've been known in coaching circles since Trackman became widespread.
e5_mechanism_type.market_sophistication_fit: Stage 4: The golf slice fix market is highly sophisticated. Golfers have heard every generic tip (grip, inside-out, wrist flip). The market needs a proprietary mechanism with specific naming and steps. The Counter-Slice Sequence delivers this with a branded 3-step system backed by extreme authority (Tiger's coach). The clubface-to-path reframe provides the Stage 3 foundation, and the proprietary sequence elevates to Stage 4.

mechanism.placement_density: Mechanism is teased in lead, partially revealed in early body, fully explained in mid-body (Root Cause + Unique Mechanism Solution sections), detailed step-by-step in 'How It Works' section, re-explained in FAQs, and referenced throughout close. The Counter-Slice Sequence name appears 25+ times throughout the copy.

Hitting snooze on alarm clock = overcompensations that temporarily work then fail
Pulling the plug on alarm clock = getting clubface square to path permanently
Old vs new ball flight laws = paradigm shift from path-determines-direction to clubface-determines-direction
Reprogramming your swing = the sequence installs new muscle memory

Animation of over-the-top swing with clubface closed to path producing a draw

mechanism.mechanism_villain_pairing: The mechanism (Counter-Slice Sequence) directly corrects the root cause that the villain (conventional golf instruction based on outdated ball flight laws) has been getting wrong for decades. The villain taught that swing path determines direction, leading golfers to chase path fixes. The mechanism addresses the TRUE determinant: clubface angle relative to path. Perfect pairing — the mechanism is the antidote to the villain's misinformation.

elements.verbatim_quote: With the use of Trackman and other swing analysis technology... We've learned it's actually the exact opposite... Your clubface angle at impact is actually what's determining the direction of the ball... And your path is what's putting on the spin

elements.content_summary: Process of elimination showing what DOESN'T cause the slice: not over-the-top swing, not grip, not takeaway, not elbow, not weight transfer, not wrist flip. Only one cause: clubface open to path.
elements.verbatim_quote: It's not because you're swinging over-the-top... It's not because your takeaway was too much to the inside or outside... It's not because you didn't keep your elbow in... It's not because you didn't transfer your weight... The truth is, there's only ONE reason you're hitting a slice or fade...

elements.content_summary: 50-golfer case study showing before/after results: practice shots flying 37 yards right on average BEFORE, then draws AFTER. Multiple golfers documented on video.
elements.verbatim_quote: Before using the Counter-Slice Sequence, his practice shots were flying 37 yards right of his target on average

elements.content_summary: Bonus coaches' credentials: James Sieckmann #1 short game coach (Golf Digest), Kevin Weeks top 3 putting teacher, Dr. Deborah Graham top 5 golf psychologist (Golf Digest, trained 400+ tour pros), Brian Mogg coached YE Yang to defeat Tiger in 2009 PGA Championship, Eric Cogorno 25,000+ lessons featured in Forbes
elements.verbatim_quote: James Sieckmann... who's the #1 ranked short game coach in the world according to Golf Digest... Kevin Weeks... who's a top 3 ranked putting teacher in the world... Dr. Deborah Graham... who's one of the top 5 golf psychologists in the world

proof_inventory.proof_sequence: The VSL opens with a bold authority flex (Tiger's coach), immediately followed by the big promise and a rhetorical challenge ('how many slice-fixing techniques were created by Tiger Woods' former coach?'). First testimonials appear in the lead to validate the core promise (fix slice in one shot). Credibility credentials are stacked early (Tiger, O'Meara, 200 tour pros, celebrity clients, 70,000 lessons). The 50-golfer case study serves as the central proof demonstration in the early-to-mid body. Root cause explanation uses Trackman science and visual demonstrations as logical proof. The mid-body features before/after video testimonials with specific results. Product reveal section builds with testimonials supporting each specific claim. Close section uses testimonials showing scorecard improvements and handicap drops. Proof is distributed throughout with strategic density spikes at the 50-golfer case study, post-mechanism reveal, and during offer presentation.

story_beats.summary: Hank Haney is introduced as Tiger Woods' former swing coach who worked with the greatest players in golf. He began his career with amateurs, moved to tour pros and Tiger, gaining the most well-rounded understanding of the golf swing possible.
key_details: Swing coach to Tiger Woods during 6 majors, 31 PGA Tour wins, 9 world golf championships
Coached Mark O'Meara for 25 years (125th to 2nd on PGA money list)
200+ other top Tour Pros
70,000+ career lessons to amateurs over 40 years
The Haney Project TV show with celebrity clients

story_beats.summary: After stopping coaching on tour (because after Tiger, where else do you go?), Haney decided his ultimate legacy should be helping millions of amateurs play good golf. Since 90% of amateurs slice, he made fixing slices his life's work.
key_details: People ask 'why did you stop coaching on tour?'
After Tiger Woods, nowhere else to go
Legacy = helping millions of amateurs
90% of amateur golfers slice
No good golfer plays with a slice

story_beats.summary: Haney observed thousands of golfers trying every conventional fix — grip changes, inside-out swing, wrist flipping, training aids, YouTube videos, expensive lessons — all failing because none addressed the true root cause.
key_details: Golfers trying strengthening grip, flipping wrists, swinging inside-out
All conventional fixes are temporary overcompensations
Golfers spending thousands of hours on the range
Fixes work temporarily then fail under pressure
Conventional instruction based on outdated ball flight laws

story_beats.summary: Through decades of coaching at the highest level and validated by modern Trackman technology, Haney identified that the ONE root cause of every slice is clubface open relative to path (not to target). He developed the proprietary Counter-Slice Sequence — a 5-minute, 3-step practice swing system that retrains the body to square the clubface to the path.
key_details: Root cause: clubface open relative to path (not to target)
Modern ball flight laws prove clubface determines direction, path determines spin
Opposite of what was taught for decades
Developed 3-step Counter-Slice Sequence: Clockwise Practice Swing, Reverse Right Move, Relax and Release Move
Works without hitting a single ball
Results in ONE shot, permanently

story_beats.summary: Haney tested the Counter-Slice Sequence on 50 lifelong slicers in a documented case study. Every golfer's slice disappeared within 5 minutes and one shot. The doubts turned to shock and amazement as they hit powerful straight shots and draws.
key_details: 50-golfer documented case study
All lifelong slicers with decades of bad habits
Everyone was skeptical going in
All fixed their slice in 5 minutes and 1 shot
Hitting draws 20-30 yards farther
Results proved to be permanent
Teaching a group proved it could be taught without in-person individual instruction

story_beats.summary: Haney partnered with Performance Golf to create the 1-Shot Slice Fix video training series, making the Counter-Slice Sequence available to all amateur golfers worldwide. Students are eliminating their slices, hitting draws, gaining 20-30 yards, and dropping their handicaps.
key_details: Partnered with Performance Golf for professional HD video production
Three $45,000 cameras, multiple angles, slow-motion
Previously only available to private clients and tour pros
Now accessible as online video training program
Includes live Q&A coaching session
Thousands of students already seeing results

story_architecture.lesson_or_moral: The reason nothing has worked to fix your slice is that everyone has been addressing the wrong root cause. Once you understand that it's about clubface-to-path (not clubface-to-target), a simple 5-minute sequence can permanently fix decades of bad habits. The answer was always simpler than you thought — you just needed the right coach with the right method.
story_architecture.persuasion_function: Build authority (Tiger's coach with 70,000 lessons establishes unimpeachable credibility), create identification (golfers who've tried everything and failed), prove mechanism (50-golfer case study validates the Counter-Slice Sequence), demonstrate transformation (before/after videos and testimonials show real results), neutralize objection (if it worked for 50 lifelong slicers it will work for you)
story_architecture.full_story_text: Hi, I'm Hank Haney... You may know me as the swing coach who worked with Tiger Woods when he won 6 majors... 31 PGA Tour events... and 9 world golf championships... Or you may have heard how I worked with Hall of Famer Mark O'Meara for 25 years... Or about my success with one of the other 200 tour pros I've helped... But what you may not know is that I've given over 70,000 lessons to amateur golfers in my 40 plus year career... And most people come to me for my PROVEN ability to fix any golfer's BIG MISS... That means, I've worked with thousands of the worst slicers on the planet and spent decades correcting their slices quickly... and without dozens of hours on the range... You see, I started my career working with amateurs... Then I moved on to tour pros, which led me to Tiger Woods... The experience I gained inside-in-the-ropes gave me the most well-rounded understanding of the golf swing I could have ever asked for... But it also made me realize that what I'm most passionate about is helping life-long slicers... People ask me all the time, 'why did you stop coaching on tour?' The answer is simple: When you work with Tiger Woods… where else are you going to go from there? That's exactly why I want my ultimate legacy to be about helping millions of amateurs play good golf...
story_architecture.story_callbacks: Haney's Tiger Woods coaching referenced throughout as primary credibility anchor. The 50-golfer case study is referenced multiple times: introduced in body, results shown with testimonials, referenced again in close and FAQs. The 70,000 lessons number is repeated at least 5 times throughout.
story_architecture.emotional_peak: The moment in the 50-golfer case study when skeptical lifelong slicers, who have tried everything for decades, see their first shot after the Counter-Slice Sequence fly straight or draw. 'Their doubts quickly turned to shock and amazement... when just like that... one by one... they were hitting either powerful straight shots... Or little baby draws that were rolling out 20 to 30 yards farther than any of their previous drives...'

section_sequence.purpose: Bold declaration of slice fix in 1 shot, immediately establish authority as Tiger's former coach
section_sequence.key_content: FACT: slice can be fixed permanently in 5 minutes and 1 shot. Introduces Hank Haney. Promises to teach method for turning slice into draw flying 20-30 yards farther. Challenges skepticism with credibility rhetorical questions.

section_sequence.purpose: Amplify pain of slicing, stack benefits of the solution, establish what the fix is NOT
section_sequence.key_content: No more aiming left, no more leaving driver in bag, no more teeing up second ball. Conventional fixes are DEAD WRONG and making things worse. Band-aid on gunshot wound metaphor. Pain of spraying slice in front of buddies, humiliation, shattered confidence, back to square one.

section_sequence.purpose: Build comprehensive credibility through career history and life's work narrative
section_sequence.key_content: Tiger's coach for 6 majors, O'Meara for 25 years, 200 tour pros, 70,000 lessons, celebrity clients. Career arc from amateurs to tour pros to Tiger and back to passion for helping amateur slicers. Legacy motivation.

section_sequence.purpose: Central proof demonstration — documented test validating the method at scale
section_sequence.key_content: Test with 50 lifelong slicers to prove method works for large group without individual instruction. Shows it works permanently for everyone. Initial skepticism turning to shock and amazement. Before/after with 37 yards right becoming 5 draws in a row.

section_sequence.purpose: Validate case study results with individual student stories emphasizing permanence and last-resort success
section_sequence.key_content: Three testimonials: skeptic converted who tried everything, golfer who hasn't sliced in months, golfer whose experiments worked temporarily but Hank's method works week after week.

section_sequence.purpose: Deepen understanding of why conventional approaches fail, amplify frustration with current situation
section_sequence.key_content: Conventional solutions are temporary overcompensations masking real root cause. Range fixes disappear on course. Multiple swing thoughts cause confusion. 90% of golfers who slice struggle with inconsistency, high scores, 20-30 yards lost per tee shot.

section_sequence.purpose: Reveal the ONE root cause: clubface open relative to path. Explain ball flight science.
section_sequence.key_content: Only ONE reason for slice: clubface open relative to path. Even inside-out swing slices if clubface is 1 degree open to path. Even OTT swing draws if clubface is closed to path. Old ball flight laws vs new (Trackman-validated). Clubface determines direction, path determines spin — opposite of conventional wisdom. Snooze button vs pulling the plug metaphor.

section_sequence.purpose: Introduce the proprietary solution and explain why it works at the root cause level
section_sequence.key_content: Counter-Slice Sequence corrects clubface-to-path relationship. Retrains mind and body to FEEL correct position without hitting balls. Eliminates overcompensation. Proven in 70,000 lessons. Must follow step-by-step. Also called 1-Shot Slice Fix.

section_sequence.purpose: Reveal the 3-step mechanism in detail, building desire to learn the complete system
section_sequence.key_content: Step 1: Clockwise Practice Swing (feel correct backswing, auto-correct path). Step 2: Reverse Right Move (trick brain into squaring club to path). Step 3: Relax and Release Move (guard against overcompensation, 30-60 seconds, permanent feel installation). All done in 5 minutes.

section_sequence.purpose: Paint vivid picture of transformed golf life 6 months from now
section_sequence.key_content: Imagine 6 months from now: stepping up to first tee with Sunday group, slice completely cured, aiming at small targets, handicap dropped 6-8 strokes, confident in betting with buddies, hitting 20-30 yards farther, secret learned from Tiger's former coach.

section_sequence.purpose: Transition from mechanism to commercial offer, build value through exclusivity and production quality
section_sequence.key_content: Previously only available to Tiger, O'Meara, private clients. Partnered with Performance Golf. Professional HD video with three $45,000 cameras. 1-Shot Slice Fix Video Series never released publicly. Instant online access from any device. Lifetime access.

section_sequence.purpose: Stack additional value with bonuses, address comprehensive game improvement
section_sequence.key_content: Bonus 1: Free 14-day pass to Scratch Club ('Netflix of Golf') with world-class coaches. 5-stroke reduction in 30 days. Bonus 2: LIVE Q&A session with Hank (normally $250/hr). Replay available.

section_sequence.purpose: Anchor high, reveal low price, eliminate risk with extreme guarantee
section_sequence.key_content: Private clients pay $1,875/hr to $15,000/day. Not $1,000, not $197. Just $47-$97. 365-day Fix Your Slice Or It's Free guarantee. Unconditional refund policy. Less than 3% of one-hour lesson cost.

section_sequence.purpose: Classic two-option close forcing decision between status quo pain and transformation
section_sequence.key_content: Option 1: Do nothing, game and slice same in 6 months, still banging balls, still aiming left, still embarrassed. Option 2: Click button, get Counter-Slice Sequence, join league of golfers with complete control, laser accuracy. Tiger didn't have a plan until Hank gave him one.

section_sequence.purpose: Handle remaining objections through FAQ format, re-explain mechanism, multiple final CTAs
section_sequence.key_content: FAQ 1: Does it really work in one shot? (Re-explains 3 steps). FAQ 2: What do I get? (Recaps offer). FAQ 3: What if it doesn't work? (Re-states 365-day guarantee). Multiple CTA repetitions with urgency language.

transition_techniques: 'But let me ask you a question...' (transitions from skepticism handling to credibility challenge)
'Because I'm committed to making sure — that after today — you NEVER hit another slice again...' (transitions from lead to benefit stacking)
'If any of this sounds familiar, then listen closely...' (transitions from pain agitation to root cause tease)
'That's also why after I stopped working with Tiger, I decided to do a test...' (transitions from background story to 50-golfer case study)
'First, let me tell you what happened in my test...' (transitions from root cause tease to case study proof)
'But here's the best news I've given you all day...' (transitions from root cause problem to mechanism solution)
'So, by now, you have to be wondering how the Counter-Slice Sequence works...' (transitions to how-it-works reveal)
'I want you to imagine 6 months from now...' (transitions to future pacing)
'I could give you even more proof... But instead, I'm going to show you how you can start using this for yourself RIGHT NOW.' (transitions from proof to product reveal)
'Now, I could just give you the 1-Shot Slice Fix Video Training and send you on your way... But as a new member of my inner circle...' (transitions to bonuses)
'Because remember a moment ago when I asked you to imagine yourself 6 months from now? Well now let's imagine an alternate reality...' (transitions to negative future pacing in crossroads close)
'Right now you have a decision to make that will have a permanent effect on your golf game.' (transitions to crossroads close)
narrative_flow.pacing_notes: Opens with aggressive authority-powered hook, then builds through pain agitation. First wave peaks at 50-golfer case study with testimonials. Slows for detailed root cause education. Second wave builds through mechanism reveal and 3-step how-it-works. Future pacing creates emotional peak. Third wave through offer, bonuses, and guarantee. Crossroads close provides final emotional crescendo. FAQs serve as cool-down with re-engagement. Multiple CTA repetitions create urgency throughout final third.
repetition_patterns: Clubface open relative to/square to the path (repeated 15+ times)
callbacks: Tiger Woods' coaching — introduced in lead, referenced in credibility section, case study, product reveal, crossroads close, and FAQs
50-golfer case study — introduced in early body, results shown in mid body, referenced in close and FAQs
70,000 lessons — introduced in lead, referenced in credibility section, mechanism solution, guarantee section
Band-aid on gunshot wound metaphor — introduced in benefit section, concept revisited as 'snooze button vs pulling the plug' in root cause section
6 months from now future pacing — first presented positively, then revisited as negative 'alternate reality' in crossroads close
Root cause revelation (clubface open to path) — teased early, fully revealed mid-body, re-explained in FAQs
Overcompensation concept — introduced in failed solutions, explained mechanically in root cause section, used as contrast in Counter-Slice Sequence solution

value_stack_sequence.item_description: Step-by-step HD video training showing how to use the Counter-Slice Sequence. Professional production with three $45,000 cameras, multiple angles, slow-motion. Lifetime access from any device.
All-Access Pass to never-before-seen video training from world's top golf instructors. Short game, putting, psychology, full swing. 'Netflix of Golf.' Continues at $19/month if kept.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: Not explicitly stated but positioned as extremely high value

value_stack_sequence.item: LIVE Q&A Bonus Chat and Video Session with Hank Haney
value_stack_sequence.item_description: Live streaming Q&A session where Hank answers questions, demonstrates, provides personalized guidance. Replay available. One full hour or more.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: $250 (normally charges up to $250/hr for LIVE stream)

offer.total_stated_value: Not explicitly totaled but implied well over $500+ (just Hank's private lesson comparison is $1,875/hr)

price_psychology.price_justification: Less than 3% of what it costs for a one hour lesson with Hank. Students fly in from all over the world paying small fortunes. This makes the same instruction accessible to all amateurs.
comparison_anchors: Less than 3% of one-hour lesson cost

urgency_scarcity.language: I don't know how long I'll leave this video online... This presentation is ending as I speak... and if you come back later I can't guarantee the discounted price... or the bonuses... or the guarantee... will still be here. If you come back to this presentation tomorrow, or next week, there's a very real chance you'll be asked to pay the full $197 listed on our main website.
urgency_scarcity.scarcity_proof: Video timer / presentation ending language. No hard countdown but repeated urgency cues.

guarantee.language: 365-Day, Fix Your Slice Or It's Free, 100% Money Back Guarantee... PLUS, our unconditional refund policy... That means you can try this out completely risk-free... and take up to an entire YEAR to decide how much you love it. This is the most generous unconditional guarantee in the entire industry.
guarantee.conditions: None stated - unconditional. Just send email to support.

bonuses.bonus_description: All-Access Pass to exclusive video training from world's top golf instructors: James Sieckmann (#1 short game), Kevin Weeks (top 3 putting), Dr. Deborah Graham (top 5 golf psychologist, 400+ tour pros), Brian Mogg, Eric Cogorno. Covers all aspects of the game. 5-stroke average reduction in 30 days.

bonuses.bonus_name: LIVE Q&A Bonus Chat and Video Session with Hank Haney
bonuses.bonus_description: Live streaming session to ensure correct implementation of 1-Shot Slice Fix. Ask any question about the game. Hank demonstrates live on screen. Replay available for those who can't attend live.

offer.unique_mechanism_claim: The only 1-Shot Slice Fix EVER created in golf. Previously only available to Tiger Woods, Mark O'Meara, 200 Tour Pros, and select private clients paying $1,875/hr. Now available as HD video training for the first time. Method proven in documented 50-golfer case study.

close.cta_text: Click the button below this video

sequence.text: 365-Day, Fix Your Slice Or It's Free, 100% Money Back Guarantee PLUS unconditional refund policy. Try completely risk-free for an entire year. Most generous guarantee in the industry. Zero risk.
There's a reason this has worked for 99% of the students I've given it to... Players are already using this to hit straighter, longer drives... and their handicaps are dropping like flies.
Testimonials showing 82 score (lowest in 10 years), handicap dropped 3.8 strokes, 25 yards added to drives.
Special discount pricing for limited time only. Come back tomorrow or next week and you'll likely pay full $197.

Imagine alternate reality where you DON'T take action: still banging balls on range, still spraying nasty slices into woods, still aiming WAY left, still putting X on scorecard, handicap exactly where it is now.

Option 1: Do nothing, game exactly the same in 6 months. Option 2: Click button, join new league of golfers with complete tee shot control, laser accuracy. Given zero risk, doesn't it make sense to at least TRY?
When I started coaching Tiger, he didn't have a plan. He got one with me and went on one of the most prolific winning streaks in history. Don't you think your slice needs a plan too?

Click the button below this video to go inside the 1-Shot Slice Fix today... Practice the Counter-Slice Sequence for 5 minutes... Head to the range... Tee up your first ball... And start your new life as a golfer without a slice... I guarantee it.

There's really no need to go on struggling with a slice for the rest of your life. And there's no need to guess... by trying to figure it all out yourself through years of trial-and-error. I've already done all the hard work for you.
There are only 10 seconds left until this presentation ends. Grab the 1-Shot Slice Fix training series now by clicking the button below this video... and END your slice for life.

close.future_pacing_text: I want you to imagine 6 months from now. You're stepping up to the first tee in your Sunday group. For months you've been playing better and better golf. You went from not being able to find the fairway... To finding new ways to make birdies. Your slice has been completely cured. You no longer fear the left-to-right ball flight... Instead, you're aiming at small targets off the tee, trying to cut corners on dog-leg lefts... And your handicap has dropped by 6 to 8 strokes. When your buddies ask you if you want in on the action... It's a no-brainer — you know you have the swing to keep your ball in play... you know you have the confidence to rip it 20 to 30 yards farther than anyone you play with... You know you have the secret to good golf... the same secret you learned from Tiger's former coach... And you know with 100% certainty that the ONE thing that used to kill your rounds... Well... that's a thing of the past... You've completely forgotten you ever had a slice at all.
close.final_objection_handling: Addresses 'what if it doesn't work for me?' with 365-day guarantee. Addresses 'I've tried everything before' with 99% success rate and worst-case scenario of just doing the sequence again. Addresses 'this seems too good to be true' with credibility (Tiger's coach) and unconditional refund. Addresses 'I can decide later' with presentation ending and price increase threat.
close.final_push: Tiger Woods didn't have a plan until Hank gave him one. If the greatest golfer ever benefited from a clear step-by-step plan, your slice needs one too. The plan is done. Just click the button.
close.risk_reversal_restatement: 365-day guarantee restated multiple times in close. 'Zero risk to you.' 'Given that there's zero risk to you... doesn't it make sense to at least try?' Full year to test. Unconditional. Support team will 'politely send you ALL your money back... with no hard feelings.'

metadata.raw_swipe_file: OSSF - Video Script - VSL Page - 9_27 - Tony_Donnie.md
metadata.central_concept: The ONE and ONLY reason you ever hit a slice is because your clubface is open relative to the path of your swing — NOT because of your grip, swing path, over-the-top move, or any other conventional 'fix' you've been taught. Modern ball flight laws (validated by Trackman) prove that clubface angle determines direction and path determines spin — the exact opposite of decades of conventional instruction. Tiger Woods' former coach Hank Haney developed the proprietary 5-minute Counter-Slice Sequence — a 3-step practice swing system (Clockwise Practice Swing, Reverse Right Move, Relax and Release Move) that retrains your body to square the clubface to the path without ever hitting a ball. After completing the 5-minute sequence, your very first shot will be a draw, permanently. Proven in 70,000+ lessons and a documented 50-golfer case study where every lifelong slicer was fixed in one shot.
metadata.extractor_notes: Exceptional golf VSL with extreme authority positioning (Tiger Woods' coach). Contains multiple lead variations (Lead 1: Gary McCord reads, Lead 2: Haney reads, Lead 2a: Unorthodox by Tony, Lead 4: Donnie). Main body (control) extracted as the primary copy. The root cause reframe is exceptionally clean: 'clubface open to path' is simple, specific, scientifically validated, and counter-intuitive to what golfers have been taught. The Counter-Slice Sequence is a strong E4 proprietary mechanism with branded 3-step naming. Proof density is heavy throughout, dominated by video testimonials with specific before/after results. The 50-golfer case study provides a powerful centralized proof demonstration. Close uses extended crossroads technique with both positive and negative future pacing. 365-day guarantee is extremely strong risk reversal. Multiple price test variants ($47/$57/$67/$97) indicate active optimization. Document also contains Launch Deck training aid bonus section for later test variants and upsell copy. The VSL demonstrates textbook persuasion architecture with a clear linear progression from authority > pain > root cause > mechanism > proof > offer > close.
